rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core conceptual issue (parameter efficiency in typed graphs) and proposes a reframing that emphasizes this aspect. It also acknowledges the prior work but doesn't fully articulate how it differs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent mentions GraphFlow-v1 as prior work, but doesn't compare against other relevant baselines or delve into the specific technical differences.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty regarding the experimental protocol and data availability, acknowledging potential limitations in the reported results.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's recommendations are directly aligned with the requested dimensions and scope of the task.
rationale.RX.4: The agent doesn't introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide specific traceability information for the proposed revisions.
